payload.label: couch
payload.short_description: dark brown leather couch, right crop
payload.long_description: Dark brown leather three-seat couch with padded, vertically segmented back cushions and visible contrast stitching; left armrest is visible, seat surfaces show creased leather sheen and slight wear, and the couch is edge-cropped on the right — appears approximately 1.2 m from the camera.
